title: The insane engineering of Deepseek V4
summary: DeepSeek V4 is a large language model supporting 1M context length with hybrid attention mechanisms including Cluster Sparse Attention (CSA), Hybrid Chunk Attention (HCA), and sliding window attention. The model achieves efficiency gains through sparse selection and anticipatory routing techniques.
